questionText: \alpha f^{\prime\prime}(t)+2\beta\,f^{\prime}(t)+\gamma f(t)=F\sin(\omega t) \ \ \text{の定常状態の }f^{\prime}(t),\quad f(0)=0,\ f^{\prime}(0)=0
referenceAnswer: f^{\prime}(t) = \frac{F}{\sqrt{\left(\frac{\gamma}{\omega} -\alpha\omega\right)^2+4\beta^2}}\sin(\omega t + \phi),\quad \textcolor{green}{ただし、}\textcolor{green}{\phi は} \textcolor{green}{\tan \phi = \dfrac{\alpha\omega^2-\gamma}{2\beta\omega}} \textcolor{green}{を満たす角。}
